about.page_title: Om — Pulser · Teamet som bygger det
about.meta_desc: Pulser bygger AI-operativsystemet for moderne fitness. Grunnlagt av en GTM-først salgsveteran og en 30-årig AI- og kunnskapsstyringssspe sialist.
about.fitness_software_is_broken_were_re: Treningsprogramvare er ødelagt. Vi bygger den på nytt.
about.pulser_is_the_operating_system_for: Pulser is the operating system for that problem. One platform for operators. One AI trener for medlemmer. A unified data layer that lets the two finally speak.
about.discovery_calls_lois_and_paid_pilo: Discovery-samtaler, LOI-er og betalte piloter før vi leverer funksjoner. Pull, ikke push.
about.peerreviewed_biomechanics_validati: Fagfellevurdert biomekanikkvalidering, EHDS-compliance, Horizon Europe-tilpasning. Saktere, vanskeligere, forsvarbart.
about.the_gym_only_wins_if_the_member_wi: The treningssenter only wins if the medlem wins. Every feature has to prove both sides benefit.
about.were_not_hiring_yet_were_building_: We're not hiring yet — we're building and validating with the first operators, trenere and medlemmer. If that sounds like you, we'd love to hear from you.
about.managed_b2b_saas_partnerships_acro: • Styrt B2B SaaS-partnerskap på tvers av EU-markeder
about.gtmfirst_founder_sells_before_buil: • GTM-først grunnlegger: selger før han bygger
about.30_years_in_knowledge_management_t: • 30+ års erfaring innen kunnskapsstyring, TRIZ, AI
about.9_years_at_epam_systems_llmbased_t: • 9 år hos EPAM Systems — LLM-baserte verktøy
about.founded_zorka_lab_seka_ai_ontology: • Grunnla Zorka Lab + SEKA AI (ontologibasert AI)
ai_coach.page_title: AI Coach — Pulser · Den forsvarbare vollgraven
ai_coach.meta_desc: Sanntids formanalyse via smartphonekamera. Wearable-integrasjon. Forebyggende helseovervåking. EHDS-kompatibel og fagfellevurdert.
ai_coach.a_coach_that_sees_every_rep_and: A trener that sees every rep. And every warning sign.
ai_coach.a_proprietary_movement_interpre: Et proprietært bevegelsesfortolkningslag, ikke en wrapper.
ai_coach.the_feature_your_competitors_ca: Funksjonen konkurrentene dine ikke kan ettermontere.
ai_coach.most_ai_fitness_apps_are_a_thin: De fleste "AI fitness"-apper er et tynt brukergrensesnitt oppå en annens API. AI Coach i Pulser.One er bygget på vårt eget proprietære bevegelsesfortolkningslag — posisjonsestimering, biomekanisk modellering, skaderisikoscoring, periodisering. Den kjører on-device der den kan, i skyen der den trenger å skalere.
ai_coach.that_means_three_things_privacy: Det betyr tre ting: privacy-first by design, en vollgrav som forsterkes med hver økt trent på plattformen, og funksjoner som en SaaS CRM ikke kan ettermontere i en sprint.
ai_coach.not_openai_not_a_thirdparty_api: Ikke OpenAI. Ikke en tredjeparts-API. Bevegelses-, risiko- og plangenerering kjører på vår egen stack.
ai_coach.pose_estimation_and_form_scorin: Posisjonsestimering og formscoring kjører lokalt på telefonen din. Lav latens, høy personvern.
ai_coach.injuryrisk_and_programming_mode: Skaderisiko- og programmeringsmodeller spores tilbake til publisert biomekanisk forskning.
ai_coach.every_session_across_pulserone_: Hver økt på tvers av Pulser.One, Pulser.Gym og Pulser.Coach skjerper modellen.
ai_coach.mediapipebased_pose_estimation_: MediaPipe-based pose estimation runs on the medlem's smartphone. Frame-by-frame form feedback on squat, deadlift, bench — no special hardware required.
ai_coach.apple_watch_garmin_whoop_oura_f: Apple Watch, Garmin, Whoop, Oura feed continuous cardiovascular and recovery signals. The trener knows when to push and when to pull back.
ai_coach.members_can_share_injuries_chro: Medlemmer kan dele skader, kroniske tilstander, medisiner. Planer skreddersys rundt reell medisinsk kontekst — med full brukerkontroll og EHDS-compliance.
ai_coach.point_your_phone_the_coach_scor: Point your phone. The trener scores depth, bar path, hip drive, knee tracking. Haptic or audio cues tell you what to fix — before you load another plate.
ai_coach.weekly_programming_that_adapts_: Ukentlig programmering som tilpasser seg det som faktisk skjedde: tapte økter, dårlig restitusjon, tøffe hverdager. Ikke en statisk PDF.
ai_coach.combined_signals_flag_elevated_: Combined signals flag elevated injury risk, signs of overtraining, cardiovascular anomalies. Members are nudged — treningssenters get context.
ai_coach.for_gym_operators_a_daily_list_: For treningssenter operators: a daily list of medlemmer at churn risk, ranked — with the reason why and the suggested intervention.
ai_coach.cto_andrei_kuryan_publishes_at_: CTO Andrei Kuryan publishes at Springer (AI-Powered Innovation, 2025). We publish biomechanics validation studies so treningssenters can sell medlemmer on clinically proven AI.
ai_coach.eu_health_data_space_regulation: EU Health Data Space-forordningen (2025/327) trer i kraft i faser fra 2026. Pulser er arkitektonisk EHDS-klar fra dag én — ikke ettermontert.
ai_coach.members_choose_what_to_share_wi: Medlemmer velger hva de deler, med hvem og hvor lenge. Dataportabilitet og retten til sletting er innebygd i produktet, ikke boltet på.
ai_coach.published_validation_unlocks_ho: Publisert validering åpner for Horizon Europe- og EHDS-tilskudd — ikke-utvannende finansiering som bare vitenskapsledete plattformer kan få tilgang til.
ai_coach.the_ai_coach_ships_with_every_c: The AI Coach ships with every copy of Pulser.One (gratis forever on the base tier, deeper features on Pro and Enterprise) and streams straight into Pulser.Gym and Pulser.Coach. A DeepTech moat built on our own IP.
contact.page_title: Kontakt — Pulser · Book en demo, be om data room
contact.meta_desc: Three ways to reach us: treningssenter owners book a 20-minute demo, investors request the data room, medlemmer tell us where they train.
contact.members_tell_us_where_you_train_:
Members

Tell us where you train — we'll reach out to your treningssenter.
contact.direct_email_works_too_gopulserf: Direkte e-post fungerer også: go@pulser.fit
contact.thanks_message_received_well_rep: Takk — meldingen er mottatt. Vi svarer innen 24 timer.
contact.name: Navn
for_coaches.meta_desc: Pulser.Coach is the cockpit for personal trainers and trenere — clients, programming, billing and live feedback on one platform, connected to every treningssenter and medlem on Pulser.
for_coaches.youre_a_coach_not_a_spreadsh: You're a trener, not a spreadsheet wrangler.
for_coaches.one_cockpit_for_everyone_you: Ett cockpit for alle du trener.
for_coaches.built_on_the_same_movement_e: Bygget på den samme bevegelsesmotoren som klientene dine allerede stoler på.
for_coaches.stop_stitching_tools_start_t: Slutt å sy sammen verktøy. Begynn å trene.
for_coaches.programming_comms_payments_s: Programmering, kommunikasjon, betalinger, planlegging, video, klientnotater — ingen av dem snakker sammen.
for_coaches.chasing_clients_rebuilding_p: Jakte klienter, gjenoppbygge planer, oppdatere regneark — tid som aldri ender på en faktura.
for_coaches.you_prescribe_a_plan_the_cli: Du foreskriver en plan. Klienten trener. Du aner ikke hva som faktisk skjedde før neste økt.
for_coaches.every_client_every_plan_ever: Every client, every plan, every payment status — one list, one tap. Across every treningssenter they visit.
for_coaches.draganddrop_plan_builder_wit: Dra-og-slipp planbygger med dine maler, øvelsesbibliotek og periodisering — levert rett inn i deres Pulser.One-app.
for_coaches.when_a_client_trains_you_see: Når en klient trener, ser du reelle sett, repetisjoner, tempo og formscore — drevet av den proprietære bevegelsesmotoren i Pulser.One.
for_coaches.automated_nudges_video_revie: Automatiserte nudges, videoanmeldelser og restitusjonspåminnelser, med AI-en som viser hvem som faktisk trenger oppmerksomheten din denne uken.
for_coaches.onlineoffline_sessions_packs: Online/offline økter, pakker, abonnementer, kanselleringer — fakturaer sendes automatisk. Ikke mer jakt.
for_coaches.connect_to_gyms_on_the_pulse: Connect to treningssenters on the Pulser network. Your medlemmer can train at partner treningssenters; the treningssenters can offer you to their medlemmer.
for_coaches.pulsercoach_plugs_directly_i: Pulser.Coach plugs directly into Pulser.One (the medlem app) and Pulser.Gym (the treningssenter OS). Whatever your client does in a session — at home, at the treningssenter, on the road — flows into your cockpit in real time.
for_coaches.no_manual_logging_no_can_you: Ingen manuell logging. Ingen "kan du sende meg en video?" Ikke mer å fly blindt mellom økter.
for_coaches.pulsercoach_is_entering_earl: Pulser.Coach is entering early access. Join the waitlist and get priority onboarding plus a seat at the trener advisory board.
for_gyms.page_title: For treningssentre — Pulser · Redusér kundefrafall, erstatt stacken din, legg til AI
for_gyms.meta_desc: The treningssenter operating system that replaces Mindbody, Glofox, a medlem app and your e-commerce — and adds an AI trener that cuts churn by 12pp.
for_gyms.crossgym_access_builtin: Tilgang på tvers av sentre · Innebygd
for_gyms.software_your_members_actually_: Software your medlemmer actually stay for.
for_gyms.youre_paying_200800month_for_so: You're paying €200–800/mndnth for software that can't talk to itself.
for_gyms.one_platform_everything_your_gy: One platform. Everything your treningssenter runs on.
for_gyms.200_members_12pp_less_churn_172: 200 medlemmer. 12pp less churn. €17–20K/year back in your pocket.
for_gyms.see_it_run_on_your_gym_in_20_mi: See it run on your treningssenter in 20 minutes.
for_gyms.not_a_saas_with_an_ai_sticker_a: Ikke en SaaS med en AI-etikett. En plattform med sin egen bevegelsesmotor.
for_gyms.your_members_train_anywhere_you: Your medlemmer train anywhere. You get new traffic in return.
for_gyms.booking_in_one_app_payments_in_: Booking in one app. Payments in another. Member app is white-labelled junk. Nothing shares data. No one sees the full medlem.
for_gyms.your_software_schedules_classes: Programvaren din planlegger timer — den forteller deg ikke at Anna ikke har dukket opp på 11 dager og er 7 dager fra å avbestille.
for_gyms.75_of_members_say_theyd_stay_if: 75% of medlemmer say they'd stay if their treningssenter offered personalised plans. You can't offer what your software can't do.
for_gyms.contact_attendance_payment_enga: Contact, attendance, payment, engagement and health data — unified per medlem.
for_gyms.group_1on1_and_pt_bookings_with: Group, 1-on-1 and PT bookings with waitlists, trener rosters and auto-reminders.
for_gyms.subscriptions_dropins_packages_: Abonnementer, drop-ins, pakker, mislykket betalingsinnkreving — EU-klar.
for_gyms.fully_whitelabel_ios_amp_androi: Fully white-label iOS & Android app — medlemmer see your brand, not ours.
for_gyms.launch_a_branded_public_website: Lansér et merkevaretilpasset nettsted fra en mal på minutter — intet webbyrå, alt er forhåndskoblet.
for_gyms.builtin_storefront_for_membersh: Built-in storefront for medlemmerhips, drop-ins, supplements, merch. +€3–6K/year typical uplift at a 200-medlem treningssenter.
for_gyms.realtime_form_feedback_via_the_: Real-time form feedback via the medlem's smartphone camera. Preventive health alerts from wearables.
for_gyms.pulsergym_ships_with_the_same_p: Pulser.Gym ships with the same proprietary movement interpretation layer that powers every medlem on Pulser.One — body scan, form scoring, injury-risk and personalised programming. Your treningssenter becomes a place where science shows up in every session.
for_gyms.any_pulserone_member_can_check_: Any Pulser.One medlem can check in at any partner treningssenter within their tier grade — built into the platform, not a third-party network. Automated settlement, reciprocal revenue-share, no front-desk workarounds. Travelling medlemmer stay loyal; travelling medlemmer from other treningssenters become your walk-ins.
for_gyms.incumbents_manage_operations_pu: Etablerte styrer drift. Pulser styrer resultater.
for_gyms.mindbody_500m_revenue_3b_valuat: Mindbody: ~$500M revenue, ~$3B valuation, IPO planned. Still no AI trenering or retention prediction.
for_gyms.a_tailored_walkthrough_of_the_p: A tailored walkthrough of the platform with real data from a treningssenter your size. No slides, no sales pitch, no commitment.
for_members.page_title: For Members — Pulser.One · Your AI trener, any treningssenter, one app
for_members.meta_desc: An AI trener in your pocket. Personalised plans, real-time form feedback, and preventive health — built into your treningssenter's branded app.
for_members.your_ai_coachany_gym_one_app:
Your AI trener.
Any treningssenter. One app.
for_members.the_coach_you_wish_you_could: The trener you wish you could afford. In your pocket.
for_members.three_steps_works_with_or_wi: Three steps. Works with or without your treningssenter.
for_members.pulser_sees_your_movement_th: Pulser ser bevegelsen din. Og hjelper deg med å eie den.
for_members.travelling_for_work_weekend_: Travelling for work? Weekend in a new city? Moved last month? Your Pulser.One medlemmerhip checks you in at any treningssenter on the network within your tier grade — with your plan, your history and your trener right there with you.
for_members.one_slow_rotation_with_your_: One slow rotation with your phone camera. Proportions, posture, composition estimate — without a treningssenter visit.
for_members.point_your_phone_at_yourself: Rett telefonen mot deg selv. Bilde-for-bilde tilbakemelding på knebøy, markløft, presser — drevet av vår bevegelsesmotor.
for_members.heart_rate_hrv_sleep_steps_f: Puls, HRV, søvn, skritt fra Apple Health, Garmin, Whoop, Oura, Android Health Connect — matet inn i planen din.
for_members.overtraining_elevated_injury: Overtrening, forhøyet skaderisiko, restitusjongjeld — flagget før det blir problemer.
for_members.walk_into_any_partner_gym_in: Walk into any partner treningssenter in the network within your tier grade — no day pass, no extra app. Your plan follows you.
for_members.book_a_human_coach_from_the_: Book a human trener from the Pulser.Coach network. They see your form data. Your sessions get sharper.
for_members.free_forever_works_on_its_ow: Gratis forever. Works on its own, or as the medlem app of any treningssenter on the Pulser network.
for_members.body_scan_goals_wearable_syn: Kroppsskanning, mål, wearable-synkronisering, eventuelle medisinske flagg. AI Coach bygger din første plan på minutter.
for_members.home_homegym_travelgym_coach: Home, home-treningssenter, travel-treningssenter, trener's treningssenter. Cross-treningssenter access is built in. Your plan adapts to every session.
for_members.tell_us_where_you_train_well: Tell us where you train — we'll reach out to your treningssenter. If your treningssenter's not on Pulser yet, you can still use Pulser.One for gratis.
for_members.your_coach_if_you_want_one: Your trener, if you want one
home.page_title: Pulser.fit — DeepTech OS for moderne fitness
home.meta_desc: Gyms, medlemmer and trenere on one platform. Powered by our proprietary movement interpretation engine. Pulser.Gym, Pulser.One and Pulser.Coach — in sync.
home.feature_crossgym_access: Funksjon · Tilgang på tvers av sentre
home.whoever_you_show_up_as_pulser_syncs: Uansett hvem du er, synkroniserer Pulser deg.
home.one_app_any_gym_on_the_network: One app. Any treningssenter on the network.
home.a_free_ai_coach_in_your_pocket_body: A gratis AI trener in your pocket. Body scan, form feedback, personalised plans — and cross-treningssenter access across the network.
home.stop_stitching_six_tools_clients_pr: Slutt å sy sammen seks verktøy. Klienter, programmering, fakturering og live bevegelsesdata i ett cockpit.
home.pulser_is_a_deeptech_company_everyt: Pulser er et DeepTech-selskap. Alt på plattformen drives av vår egen bevegelsesfortolkningsmotor — kroppsskanning, live formtilbakemelding, skaderisikoscoring, tretthetsdeksjon og personalisert periodisering. Ikke et OpenAI-kall. Ikke en wrapper på andres modell. Vår IP, våre data, vårt fortrinn.
home.the_deeper_every_gym_member_and_coa: The deeper every treningssenter, medlem and trener uses the platform, the better the model gets. That is the flywheel generic fitness SaaS cannot build.
home.your_pulserone_membership_checks_yo: Your Pulser.One medlemmerhip checks you in at any partner treningssenter of the same grade — home, travel or a spontaneous Saturday in a new city.
home.earn_reciprocal_traffic_and_revenue: Earn reciprocal traffic and revenue share on every visit from a Pulser.One medlem, with automated settlement and zero front-desk overhead.
home.your_clients_keep_training_and_you_: Your clients keep training — and you keep seeing their real session data — even when they're not in your home treningssenter.
home.crossgym_access_is_built_into_the_p: Cross-treningssenter access is built into the Pulser.Gym and Pulser.One product from day one — not a third-party network bolted on top.
home.whether_you_run_a_gym_train_clients: Whether you run a treningssenter, train clients or just want to train smarter yourself — Pulser plugs you into one platform, one engine, one network.
home.proprietary_movement_interpretation: Proprietært bevegelsesfortolkningslag — vår kjernestack, ikke lisensiert.
home.runs_ondevice_where_it_can_fast_pri: Kjører on-device der den kan — raskt, privat, ingen skyavhengighet.
home.designed_for_the_2026_european_heal: Designet for 2026 European Health Data Space-reguleringen.
home.injuryrisk_models_built_on_publishe: Skaderisikomodeller bygget på publisert forskning — ikke magefølelse.
home.eu_fitness_software_ai_coaching_tam: EU fitness software + AI trenering TAM
home.of_gymgoers_open_to_aipowered_coach: Of treningssenter-goers open to AI-powered trenering
home.gen_z_picks_a_gym_based_on_the_memb: Gen Z picks a treningssenter based on the medlem app
investors.meta_desc: En informasjonsbriefing om Pulser — DeepTech-operativsystemet for moderne fitness. Marked, vollgrav, traction og veikart, samlet på ett sted.
investors.a_deeptech_operating_system_fo: A DeepTech operating system for a €8.4B treningssenter software market.
investors.why_incumbents_cant_copy_this: Hvorfor etablerte ikke kan kopiere dette.
investors.from_poc_to_commercial_pilots_: Fra PoC til kommersielle piloter på 12 måneder.
investors.want_a_deeper_conversation: Vil du ha en dypere samtale?
investors.we_are_not_running_a_public_fu: Vi kjører ikke en offentlig innsamlingsprosess på denne siden. Hvis du er investor og ønsker en samtale, kan du kontakte grunnleggeren direkte på go@pulser.fit.
investors.pose_estimation_biomechanical_: Posisjonsestimering, biomekanisk modellering, skaderisikoscoring og periodisering kjører på vår egen stack — ikke en wrapper på en tredjeparts-API. Bevegelsesfortolkningslaget er produktet; alt annet er distribusjon.
investors.mindbody_and_glofox_were_built: Mindbody og Glofox ble bygget som planleggingsverktøy. Å legge til DeepTech-nivå bevegelses-AI krever et samlet datalag de ikke har. Gjenoppbygging tar år og fremmedgjør eksisterende kunder.
investors.camera_wearables_usershared_he: Kamera + wearables + brukerdelte helsejournaler mater en rikere modell med hver økt på tvers av Pulser.Gym, Pulser.One og Pulser.Coach. Mer data → bedre prediksjoner → høyere kundelojalitet.
investors.validation_studies_in_biomecha: Valideringsstudier i biomekanikkjournaler åpner for Horizon Europe- og EHDS-tilskudd — ikke-utvannende finansiering som konkurrenter ikke kan få tilgang til.
investors.eu_health_data_regulation_2025: EU-helsedataforordningen (2025/327) trer i kraft fra 2026. Ettermontering av compliance i legacy-systemer er en flerårig kostnad på flere millioner. Vi er bygget EHDS-klar fra dag én.
investors.every_pulserone_member_can_tra: Every Pulser.One medlem can train at any partner treningssenter in the same tier. Reciprocal traffic + automated settlement make the network more valuable with every treningssenter that joins.
investors.warsaw_gym_owners_consistent_p: Warsaw treningssenter owners. Consistent pain: fragmented tools, zero engagement data, rising churn.
investors.first_letters_of_intent_from_b: Første intensjonsavtaler fra boutique-studioer for pilotprogram. Mål: 5 signerte LOI-er innen Q2 2026.
investors.eic_accelerator_poland_prize_s: EIC Accelerator + Poland Prize innsendt. Grunnlegger har tidligere vunnet LLB 02-242 EU-tilskudd.
investors.architecture_amp_prototype_des: Arkitektur & prototypedesign klar. MediaPipe-basert sanntids formanalyse på smarttelefon.
investors.stage_trl_2_ai_architecture_an: Stage: TRL 2 — AI architecture and prototype concept defined. Target: TRL 4–5 (lab / treningssenter-validated prototype) within 12 months.
investors.this_page_is_a_public_overview: Denne siden er en offentlig oversikt. Dypere materialer — teknisk arkitektur, finansiell modell, cap table, LOI-er og tilskuddssøknader — deles én-til-én under NDA med investorer vi er i aktiv samtale med.
investors.61_of_gym_members_already_use_: • 61% of treningssenter medlemmer already use AI-driven fitness tools (ABC Fitness 2025)
investors.47_of_new_gym_joins_are_gen_z_: • 47% of new treningssenter joins are Gen Z — digital-native, AI-expectant
platform.meta_desc: Pulser-plattformen: Pulser.Gym, Pulser.One og Pulser.Coach, alt drevet av vår proprietære DeepTech bevegelsesfortolkningsmotor.
platform.why_one_platform_beats_a_stack: Hvorfor én plattform slår en stack
platform.member_crm_scheduling_billing_b: Member CRM, scheduling, billing, branded app, e-commerce and the AI that keeps medlemmer subscribed.
platform.body_scan_live_form_feedback_pe: Body scan, live form feedback, personalised plans, injury-risk score and cross-treningssenter access — with AI Coach built in.
platform.client_roster_programming_studi: Client roster, programming studio, live session data, billing and a treningssenter-network marketplace — one cockpit.
platform.pulser_is_a_deeptech_company_ou: Pulser er et DeepTech-selskap. Vår bevegelsesfortolkningsmotor er IP vi eier — bygget fra fagfellevurdert biomekanisk forskning og trent på reelle øktsdata fra plattformen. Den kjører on-device der det er mulig, i skyen der den trenger å skalere.
platform.every_tap_on_the_platform_feeds: Every tap on the platform feeds back into the engine. The medlem gets better cues. The trener gets a clearer picture. The treningssenter gets lower churn. The moat compounds.
platform.body_scan_posture_composition_l: Kroppsskanning, holdning, sammensetning, live form. Én telefonkamera, én proprietær modell.
platform.rep_counting_tempo_rom_bar_path: Repetisjonstelling, tempo, ROM, stangbane, risikomodellering — basert på publisert forskning.
platform.hrv_sleep_activity_apple_health: HRV, søvn, aktivitet — Apple Health, Garmin, Whoop, Oura, Android Health Connect.
platform.built_into_pulserone_plans_aler: Innebygd i Pulser.One. Planer, varsler og nudges generert fra dine egne data, ikke feeden din.
platform.gym_member_and_coach_all_read_f: Gym, medlem and trener all read from the same source. No CSV exports. No Zapier glue.
platform.every_gym_member_and_coach_on_p: Every treningssenter, medlem and trener on Pulser makes every other part more valuable. Cross-treningssenter access is built in.
platform.proprietary_movement_engine_is_: Proprietær bevegelsesmotor er vår kjerne-IP — ikke en modell fra tredjepart som enhver konkurrent også kan kalle.
platform.designed_for_the_european_healt: Designet for European Health Data Space fra dag én — portabelt, med samtykke, compliant.
pricing.page_title: Priser — Pulser · Pulser.Gym, Pulser.One og Pulser.Coach-nivåer
pricing.meta_desc: Three products, clear tiers. Pulser.One is gratis for medlemmer. Pulser.Gym starts gratis and unlocks the AI trener on Pro. Pulser.Coach priced per trener.
pricing.free_for_members_fair_for_gyms_a: Gratis for medlemmer. Fair for treningssenters and trenere.
pricing.the_ai_coach_in_your_pocket: The AI trener, in your pocket.
pricing.run_your_gym_on_one_platform: Run your treningssenter on one platform.
pricing.one_cockpit_instead_of_six_tabs: Ett cockpit i stedet for seks faner.
pricing.is_pulserone_really_free_for_mem: Is Pulser.One really gratis for medlemmer forever?
pricing.can_i_import_my_existing_member_: Can I import my existing medlem data?
pricing.do_members_or_coaches_need_speci: Do medlemmer or trenere need special hardware?
pricing.how_does_the_crossgym_network_wo: How does the cross-treningssenter network work commercially?
pricing.how_does_ehds_compliance_affect_: How does EHDS compliance affect me as a treningssenter?
pricing.everything_a_member_needs_to_sta: Everything a medlem needs to start training better. Gratis for every Pulser medlem, full stop.
pricing.for_members_who_want_deeper_insi: For medlemmer who want deeper insight and cross-treningssenter access. Optional — the base app stays gratis.
pricing.replace_your_scheduling_tool_tod: Erstatt planleggingsverktøyet ditt i dag. Solotrenere og nye studioer.
pricing.full_management_platform_ai_coac: Full management platform, AI Coach signals and a fully branded medlem app. For studios, clubs and chains of any type.
pricing.multilocation_chains_franchises_: Multi-location chains, franchises and premium clubs. The base fee covers the platform and your first location; each additional treningssenter is €149/mnd. Custom SLA, full API, co-branded portal.
pricing.for_independent_coaches_running_: For independent trenere running their own book of clients.
pricing.full_deeptech_cockpit_with_live_: Fullt DeepTech-cockpit med live formtilbakemelding, biomekaniske innsikter og AI-copilot.
pricing.for_coaching_collectives_pt_team: For trenering collectives, PT teams inside treningssenters and franchises. The base includes the team cockpit and your first 3 trener seats; each additional trener is €49/mnd.
pricing.yes_the_base_tier_is_free_foreve: Yes. The base tier is gratis forever. Only Premium (€9.99/mnd) adds cross-treningssenter access, deep biomechanics reports and preventive health alerts — the core AI trener is gratis.
pricing.enterprise_gyms_pay_299mo_for_th: Enterprise treningssenters pay €299/mnd for the platform (first location included) plus €149/mnd per additional treningssenter. Coach teams pay €149/mnd (first 3 seats included) plus €49/mnd per additional trener. You only pay for what you actually run.
pricing.yes_we_support_csv_import_and_bu: Yes. We support CSV import and build custom migration scripts for Mindbody, Glofox and Virtuatreningssenter during onboarding.
pricing.no_form_analysis_runs_on_any_mod: Nei. Formanalyse kjører på ethvert moderne smartphonekamera. Wearable-integrasjon er valgfri men anbefalt.
pricing.each_pulserone_plus_visit_to_a_p: Each Pulser.One Plus visit to a partner treningssenter triggers automated settlement between treningssenters based on tier grade. No front-desk friction, no manual reconciliation.
pricing.ehds_becomes_mandatory_for_eu_he: EHDS blir obligatorisk for EU-helsedatahåndteringsplattformer fra 2026. Å kjøre på Pulser betyr at du er compliant som standard.
pricing.gym_pro_has_a_onetime_onboarding: Gym Pro har et engangs-onboardinggebyr dekket av din første måneds besparelse. Enterprise inkluderer skreddersydd onboarding i kontrakten.
pricing.book_a_20minute_call_well_map_yo: Book en 20-minutters samtale. Vi kartlegger arbeidsflyten din til riktig kombinasjon av Pulser.Gym, Pulser.One og Pulser.Coach.
pricing.wearable_sync_apple_watch_garmin: ✓ Wearable-synkronisering (Apple Watch, Garmin, Whoop, Oura)
pricing.crossgym_access_any_partner_gym_: ✓ Cross-treningssenter access (any partner treningssenter, same tier)
pricing.full_whitelabel_site_app_amp_the: ✓ Full white-label side, app & temaer
pricing.access_any_partner_gym_in_the_ne: ✓ Access any partner treningssenter in the network
pulser_coach.meta_desc: Pulser.Coach er den tredje søylen i Pulser-plattformen: et fullstendig operativsystem for personlige trenere, drevet av vår proprietære DeepTech-bevegelsesmotor.
pulser_coach.every_client_every_plan_zer: Hver klient. Hver plan. Null kaos.
pulser_coach.join_the_first_cohort_of_pu: Bli med i den første kohorten av Pulser.Coach.
pulser_coach.every_client_profile_with_t: Hver klientprofil med treningshistorikk, mål, begrensninger og live planstatus.
pulser_coach.draganddrop_plan_builder_wi: Dra-og-slipp planbygger med maler, periodisering og et øvelsesbibliotek — synkronisert til Pulser.One.
pulser_coach.the_deeptech_movement_engin: DeepTech-bevegelsesmotoren i Pulser.One scorer form i sanntid — du ser det i cockpitet ditt.
pulser_coach.scheduled_nudges_video_repl: Planlagte nudges, videosvar, asynkrone talemeldinger. AI prioriterer hvem som trenger deg mest denne uken.
pulser_coach.sessions_packs_subscription: Økter, pakker, abonnementer, kanselleringer, EU-klare betalinger. Fakturaer sendes automatisk.
pulser_coach.host_sessions_at_any_gym_on: Host sessions at any treningssenter on the Pulser network. Get discovered by medlemmer browsing for a trener.
pulser_coach.the_same_proprietary_moveme: The same proprietary movement interpretation layer your clients use in Pulser.One streams into your cockpit — form score, tempo, ROM, fatigue markers. That's a DeepTech moat no generic trener-app can copy.
pulser_coach.other_coach_tools_are_isola: Other trener tools are isolated. Pulser.Coach is part of a platform with treningssenters and medlemmer already on it — so the people you need to reach are already here.
pulser_coach.designed_to_meet_the_2026_e: Designet for å oppfylle 2026 European Health Data Space-reglene fra dag én. Klientenes data forblir portabelt, med samtykke og compliant.
pulser_coach.replaces_scheduling_payment: Replaces scheduling, payments, programming, video trenering, client CRM and analytics. Starts at trener-friendly pricing, not SaaS-bundle pricing.
pulser_coach.pulsercoach_is_in_guided_ea: Pulser.Coach er i guidet tidlig tilgang. Søk om den første kohorten — prioritert onboarding, rabattert pris, direkte linje til produktteamet.
pulser_gym.meta_desc: Pulser.Gym replaces Mindbody, Glofox, your medlem app and your e-commerce platform with one unified treningssenter OS — powered by a proprietary DeepTech movement engine.
pulser_gym.run_your_gym_on_one_platform: Run your treningssenter on one platform.
pulser_gym.one_workflow_one_invoice_one_: Én arbeidsflyt. Én faktura. Én kilde til sannhet.
pulser_gym.your_website_your_store_your_: Nettstedet ditt, butikken din, appen din — alt generert fra én admin.
pulser_gym.start_free_unlock_the_ai_coac: Start gratis. Unlock the AI trener when you're ready.
pulser_gym.a_proprietary_movement_engine: A proprietary movement engine, inside your treningssenter OS.
pulser_gym.one_membership_any_gym_in_the: One medlemmerhip. Any treningssenter in the network.
pulser_gym.profile_attendance_payments_e: Profile, attendance, payments, engagement, communication timeline — per medlem, in one place.
pulser_gym.classes_pt_coach_rosters_wait: Classes, PT, trener rosters, waitlists, capacity, reminders — drag-and-drop calendar, mobile-first.
pulser_gym.subscriptions_dropins_package: Abonnementer, drop-ins, pakker, purringer, EU SEPA + kort. Ingen tredjeparts gateway-lock-in.
pulser_gym.your_logo_your_colours_your_v: Din logo, dine farger, din stemme. iOS og Android, App Store og Play Store.
pulser_gym.ship_a_fully_branded_public_w: Lansér et fullt merkevaretilpasset nettsted på minutter — velg en mal, legg inn innholdet ditt, gå live på ditt eget domene.
pulser_gym.sell_memberships_dropins_supp: Sell medlemmerhips, drop-ins, supplements, merch, digital products — one checkout, medlem pricing, in-app purchase.
pulser_gym.members_in_the_pulserone_app_: Members in the Pulser.One app can train at any partner treningssenter of the same grade while travelling — revenue-share and reciprocal access, built in.
pulser_gym.pulsergym_ships_with_the_same: Pulser.Gym ships with the same proprietary movement interpretation layer that powers the Pulser.One medlem app — real-time body scan, form feedback, injury-risk scoring and personalised programming. Not a wrapper on someone else's model. Our own IP.
pulser_gym.any_pulserone_member_can_chec: Any Pulser.One medlem can check in at any partner treningssenter within their tier grade — business trips, weekends away, moving cities. You get reciprocal traffic, automated settlement and zero front-desk friction.
pulser_gym.pulsergym_ships_with_a_whitel: Pulser.Gym ships with a white-label site builder. Pick a template, upload your logo, set your colours and domain — and Pulser publishes a branded public website and e-commerce store wired straight into your scheduling, medlemmerhips, payments and medlem app. No web agency. No Stripe-and-Shopify glue. No separate CMS to maintain.
pulser_gym.curated_templates_for_boutiqu: Curated templates for boutique treningssenters, chains, yoga, combat sports, CrossFit, climbing walls, padel clubs, sports centres. Production-ready, SEO-clean, multilingual.
pulser_gym.class_schedules_membership_si: Class schedules, medlemmerhip sign-up, drop-in booking, trener profiles, trial offers, contact forms, Apple/Google Pay, VAT, invoices, GDPR/EHDS. All live on day one.
pulser_gym.custom_domain_ssl_your_logo_y: Custom domain, SSL, your logo, your colours, your copy. The medlem never sees the word "Pulser" unless you want them to.
pulser_gym.the_website_the_store_the_mem: The website, the store, the medlem app and the back office are one system, not four. A lead who lands on your home page becomes a paying medlem without ever leaving your brand, and the data lands cleanly in one CRM from the first click to the first check-in.
pulser_gym.launch_a_new_location_seasona: Lansér en ny lokasjon, sesongkampanje eller nisjetilbud på en dag, ikke et kvartal.
pulser_gym.pulsergyms_starter_tier_is_fr: Pulser.Gym's Starter tier is gratis — replace your scheduling tool today. Upgrade to Pro for the AI trener, branded app and cross-treningssenter network.
pulser_gym.scheduling_amp_bookings_synce: • Planlegging & bookinger synkronisert live med Pulser.Gym
pulser_gym.emailsms_via_your_pulser_inbo: • E-post/SMS via din Pulser-innboks + automatiserte flyter
pulser_gym.4_members_at_high_churn_risk_: 4 medlemmer at high churn risk this week — scripted outreach ready to send
pulser_one.meta_desc: Pulser.One is the medlem app of the Pulser platform — training, AI form feedback, cross-treningssenter access and your built-in AI Coach, powered by our proprietary DeepTech movement engine.
pulser_one.your_gym_your_coach_your_body: Your treningssenter. Your trener. Your body. One app.
pulser_one.everything_your_coach_would_c: Everything your trener would charge for — built in.
pulser_one.wherever_you_train_pulserone_: Uansett hvor du trener, trener Pulser.One med deg.
pulser_one.travelling_moving_just_curiou: Travelling? Moving? Just curious? Every Pulser.One medlem can check in at any treningssenter on the Pulser network within their tier grade — no extra apps, no surprise day-passes. Your plan, your trener and your history come with you.
pulser_one.built_from_scratch_with_ai_in: Bygget fra bunnen med AI i kjernen, ikke boltet på som en markedsføringsslagord.
pulser_one.mediapipe_tracks_33_body_keyp: MediaPipe sporer 33 kroppsreferansepunkter ved 30fps — ingen sky, ingen forsinkelse. Reelle leddvinkler, bilateral symmetri, formscore per repetisjon.
pulser_one.rotate_once_get_body_shape_fr: Rotér én gang. Få kroppsform, kroppsstørrelse, sammensetningsestimat, holdningsflagg og en treningsplan bygget for dine faktiske proporsjoner.
pulser_one.ai_analyses_joint_biomechanic: AI analyserer leddbiomekanikk, bevegelsesasymmetri og Health Connect-data (HRV, søvn, hvilepuls) for å forutsi skaderisiko før det skjer — en 0–100 score med soneinndeling og personaliserte forebyggingssignaler.
pulser_one.reads_fitbit_samsung_health_g: Leser Fitbit, Samsung Health, Garmin, Pixel Watch — alt gjennom én API. 500+ tilkoblede enheter mater skaderisikomodellen automatisk.
pulser_one.your_workout_plan_updates_bas: Treningsplanen din oppdateres basert på kroppsskanningen din, bevegelseshistorikk og Health Connect-data. Ingen spørreskjema-gjetting.
pulser_one.perexercise_form_trend_joint_: Formtrend per øvelse, leddnøyaktighetshistorikk, personlige rekorder. Se tydelig at du faktisk blir bedre.
pulser_one.barbells_cables_machines_and_: Vektstenger, kabeltrekk, maskiner og kardio. Progressiv overbelastning sporet per øvelse. Kamera-AI fungerer fra din plasserte telefon i enhver vinkel.
pulser_one.bodyweight_mastery_from_begin: Kroppsvektmestring — fra nybegynnerprogresjoner til avanserte ferdigheter. AI sporer leddstilling, spenning og tempo ved hver repetisjon.
pulser_one.ai_tracks_depth_alignment_and: AI sporer dybde, justering og balanse i sanntid. Stilling-for-stilling tilbakemelding, holdetimere og et daglig mobilitetsprogram bygget rundt skaderisikoscoren din.
pulser_one.bodyweight_resistance_bands_d: Kroppsvekt, strikker, manualer eller null utstyr. Fulle programmer bygget rundt nøyaktig det du eier — ikke det du skulle ønske du hadde.
pulser_one.park_bars_stairs_sprints_and_: Utendørs stenger, trapper, sprints og utendørsløkker. GPS- og kardiodata fra Health Connect beriker hver økt.
pulser_one.fightcamp_conditioning_sports: Fight-camp conditioning, idrettsspesifikk styrke- og powertrening. Skaderisikomotor tilpasset høybelastning.
pulser_one.running_cycling_swimming_and_: Løping, sykling, svømming og roing — sporet via Health Connect. HRV + belastningsovervåking mates automatisk inn i skaderisikoscoren din.
pulser_one.returnfrominjury_progressions: Tilbakevending-fra-skade progresjoner, fysioterapi-nivå mobilitetsprotokoller og belastningsstyring. Skaderisikoscoren driver automatisk hver beslutning.
pulser_one.the_free_tier_is_genuinely_us: The gratis tier is genuinely useful — not a crippled trial.
pulser_one.everything_you_need_to_get_st: Alt du trenger for å komme i gang. Ingen prøveperiode.
pulser_one.billed_monthly_cancel_anytime: Faktureres månedlig. Avslutt når som helst med 2 trykk.
pulser_one.prices_shown_in_local_currenc: Priser vist i lokal valuta der tilgjengelig. MVA kan tilkomme.
